Our subsequent reassessment of the effects of monetary policy yields two key results: First, estimates of the high-frequency effects on asset prices are largely unchanged; Second, estimates of the effects on the macroeconomy are substantially larger and more significant than what previous studies using high-frequency data have typically found.
29939.zh_abstract: 联邦公开市场委员会（FOMC）公告前后利率的高频变化是识别货币政策对资产价格和宏观经济影响的重要工具。然而，最近一些研究对这些货币政策意外作为工具的外生性和相关性提出了质疑，特别是在估计货币政策冲击的宏观经济效应方面。例如，货币政策意外与FOMC公告前公开可得的宏观经济和金融数据相关。我们通过两种方式解决这些担忧：首先，我们将货币政策公告集扩大到包括美联储主席的演讲，这使公告的数量和重要性翻倍；其次，我们根据鲍尔和斯旺森（2021）的“美联储对新闻的反应”渠道解释了货币政策意外的可预测性，并通过将意外与公告前的宏观经济和金融数据正交化来考虑这一点。随后我们对货币政策影响的重新评估得出了两个关键结果：首先，对资产价格高频影响的估计基本不变；其次，对宏观经济影响的估计比以往使用高频数据的研究通常发现的结果要大得多且更显著。

29938.title: Independent Regulators and Financial Stability: Evidence from Gubernatorial Campaigns and a Progressive Era Policy Experiment
29938.zh_title: 独立监管机构与金融稳定：来自州长竞选活动与进步时代政策实验的证据
29938.abstract: Regulatory independence forms a foundation for modern financial systems. To illuminate the value of this ubiquitous institution, we examine a Progressive Era policy experiment in which hitherto independent regulators came under gubernatorial supervision. After this change, failure rates declined during gubernatorial election campaigns for banks under gubernatorial jurisdiction. Declines did not occur during campaigns for other officials or for nationally chartered banks. Declines in bank resolutions during campaigns reduced business bankruptcies. We corroborate these claims with new data and novel IV regressions. Our results indicate that political subservience of financial regulators links electoral and economic cycles.
29938.zh_abstract: 监管独立性构成了现代金融体系的基础。为了阐明这一普遍制度的价值，我们考察了一个进步时代的政策实验，在该实验中，此前独立的监管机构受到州长监督。在这一变化之后，受州长管辖的银行在州长选举竞选期间的失败率下降了。在其他官员竞选期间或针对全国性特许银行，并未出现下降。竞选期间银行处置的减少降低了企业破产率。我们利用新数据和新颖的IV回归来证实这些说法。我们的结果表明，金融监管机构的政治从属性将选举周期与经济周期联系起来。
29938.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ME, POL；JEL：G01, G21, G33, H1, H7, K2, L51, N1, N2

29937.title: Stubborn Beliefs in Search Equilibrium
29937.zh_title: 搜索均衡中的固执信念
29937.abstract: I study a search equilibrium model of the labor market in which workers have stubborn beliefs about their labor market prospects, i.e. beliefs about their probability of finding a job and the wage they will earn that do not respond to aggregate fluctuations in fundamentals. I show that, when workers have stubborn beliefs, the response of the wage bargained by a firm and a worker to aggregate shocks is dampened. As a result, the response of labor market tightness, job-finding probability, unemployment and vacancies to aggregate fluctuations is amplified. I show that stubborn beliefs generate cyclical inefficiencies in the labor market that can be corrected with countercyclical employment subsidies. I find that the response of the labor market to negative shocks is the same even if only a small fraction of workers has stubborn beliefs. In contrast, if the fraction of workers with stubborn beliefs is small, the response of the labor market to positive shocks is approximately the same as under rational expectations.
29937.zh_abstract: 我研究了一个劳动力市场的搜索均衡模型，其中工人对其劳动力市场前景持有固执信念，即关于他们找到工作的概率和将获得的工资的信念，这些信念不会对基本面的总体波动做出反应。我证明，当工人持有固执信念时，企业和工人之间谈判的工资对总体冲击的反应会减弱。结果，劳动力市场紧张程度、找工作概率、失业率和职位空缺对总体波动的反应被放大。我表明，固执信念会在劳动力市场中产生周期性低效率，可以通过反周期的就业补贴来纠正。我发现，即使只有一小部分工人持有固执信念，劳动力市场对负面冲击的反应也是相同的。相反，如果持有固执信念的工人比例很小，劳动力市场对正面冲击的反应大约与理性预期下的情况相同。

29936.title: Programming FPGAs for Economics: An Introduction to Electrical Engineering Economics
29936.zh_title: 为经济学编程FPGA：电气工程经济学导论
29936.authors: Bhagath Cheela, André DeHon, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Alessandro Peri
29936.abstract: We show how to use field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) and their associated high-level synthesis (HLS) compilers to solve heterogeneous agent models with incomplete markets and aggregate uncertainty (Krusell and Smith, 1998). We document that the acceleration delivered by one single FPGA is comparable to that provided by using 74 CPU cores in a conventional cluster. We describe how to achieve multiple acceleration opportunities—pipeline, data-level parallelism, and data precision—with minimal modification of the C code written for a traditional sequential processor, which we then deploy on FPGAs easily available at Amazon Web Services. We quantify the speedup and cost of these accelerations. Our paper is the first step toward a new field, electrical engineering economics, focused on designing computational accelerators for economics to tackle challenging quantitative models.
29936.zh_abstract: 我们展示了如何使用现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）及其相关的高层次综合（HLS）编译器来解决具有不完全市场和总体不确定性的异质性主体模型（Krusell and Smith, 1998）。我们记录到，单个FPGA提供的加速效果与在传统集群中使用74个CPU核心相当。我们描述了如何通过对为传统顺序处理器编写的C代码进行最小修改来实现多种加速机会——流水线、数据级并行和数据精度，然后我们将其部署在亚马逊网络服务上易于获得的FPGA上。我们量化了这些加速的速度提升和成本。我们的论文是向一个新领域——电气工程经济学——迈出的第一步，该领域专注于为经济学设计计算加速器，以应对具有挑战性的定量模型。

29935.title: Heterogeneity in Place Effects on Health: The Case of Time Preferences and Adolescent Obesity
29935.zh_title: 地方健康效应的异质性：以时间偏好与青少年肥胖为例
29935.authors: Ashlesha Datar, Nancy Nicosia, Anya Samek
29935.abstract: We leverage a natural experiment in combination with data on adolescents’ time preferences to assess whether there is heterogeneity in place effects on adolescent obesity. We exploit the plausibly exogenous assignment of military servicemembers, and consequently their children, to different installations to identify place effects. Adolescents’ time preferences are measured by a validated survey scale. Using the obesity rate in the assigned installation county as a summary measure of its obesity-related environments, we show that exposure to counties with higher obesity rates increases the likelihood of obesity among less patient adolescents but not among their more patient counterparts.
29935.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项自然实验，结合青少年时间偏好的数据，来评估地方效应对青少年肥胖是否存在异质性。我们利用军人（及其子女）被分配到不同基地的看似外生的分配来识别地方效应。青少年的时间偏好通过一个经过验证的调查量表来衡量。使用分配基地所在县的肥胖率作为其肥胖相关环境的概括性指标，我们表明，暴露于肥胖率较高的县会增加缺乏耐心的青少年肥胖的可能性，但对更有耐心的青少年则没有这种影响。

29976.title: A Linear Panel Model with Heterogeneous Coefficients and Variation in Exposure
29976.zh_title: 具有异质性系数和暴露程度变化的线性面板模型
29976.abstract: Linear panel models featuring unit and time fixed effects appear in many areas of empirical economics. An active literature studies the interpretation of the ordinary least squares estimator of the model, commonly called the two-way fixed effects (TWFE) estimator, in the presence of unmodeled coefficient heterogeneity. We illustrate some implications for the case where the research design takes advantage of variation across units (say, US states) in exposure to some treatment (say, a policy change). In this case, the TWFE can fail to estimate the average (or even a weighted average) of the units' coefficients. Under some conditions, there exists no estimator that is guaranteed to estimate even a weighted average. Building on the literature, we note that when there is a unit totally unaffected by treatment, it is possible to estimate an average effect by replacing the TWFE with an average of difference-in-differences estimators.
29976.zh_abstract: 包含个体和时间固定效应的线性面板模型出现在实证经济学的许多领域。一个活跃的文献研究了在存在未建模系数异质性的情况下，该模型的普通最小二乘估计量（通常称为双向固定效应估计量）的解释。我们针对研究设计利用不同单位（例如美国各州）在某种处理（例如政策变化）暴露程度变化的情况，阐述了一些含义。在这种情况下，双向固定效应估计量可能无法估计各单位系数的平均值（甚至加权平均值）。在某些条件下，不存在任何估计量能够保证估计出甚至一个加权平均值。在现有文献的基础上，我们指出，当存在一个完全不受处理影响的单位时，可以通过用双重差分估计量的平均值替代双向固定效应估计量来估计平均效应。

29975.title: The New Corporate Governance
29975.abstract: In the last few years, there has been a dramatic increase in shareholder engagement on environmental and social issues. In some cases shareholders are pushing companies to take actions that may reduce market value. It is hard to understand this behavior using the dominant corporate governance paradigm based on shareholder value maximization. We explain how jurisprudence has sustained this criterion in spite of its economic weaknesses. To overcome these weaknesses we propose the criterion of shareholder welfare maximization and argue that it can better explain observed behavior. Finally, we outline how shareholder welfare maximization can be implemented in practice.
29975.zh_abstract: 在过去几年中，股东在环境和社会问题上的参与度显著增加。在某些情况下，股东正在推动公司采取可能降低市场价值的行动。基于股东价值最大化的主流公司治理范式难以理解这种行为。我们解释了法理学如何在尽管存在经济弱点的情况下维持了这一标准。为了克服这些弱点，我们提出了股东福利最大化的标准，并认为它能更好地解释观察到的行为。最后，我们概述了如何在实践中实施股东福利最大化。

29974.title: Understanding the Economic Impact of COVID-19 on Women
29974.zh_title: 理解COVID-19对女性的经济影响
29974.abstract: The impact of the pandemic on the employment, labor supply, and caregiving of women is assessed. Compared with previous recessions, that induced by COVID-19 impacted women’s employment and labor force participation more relative to men. But the big divide was less between men and women than it was between the more- and the less-educated. Contrary to many accounts, women did not exit the labor force in large numbers, and they did not greatly decrease their hours of work. The aggregate female labor force participation rate did not plummet. The ability to balance caregiving and work differed greatly by education, occupation, and race. The more educated could work from home. Those who began the period employed in various in-person “service” occupations and establishments experienced large reductions in employment. Black women were more negatively impacted beyond other factors considered and the health impact of COVID-19 is a probable reason. The estimation of the pandemic’s impact depends on the counterfactual used. The real story of women during the pandemic concerns the fact that employed women who were educating their children, and working adult daughters who were caring for their parents, were stressed because they were in the labor force, not because they left.
29974.zh_abstract: 评估了疫情对女性就业、劳动力供给和照护的影响。与以往的经济衰退相比，COVID-19引发的衰退对女性就业和劳动力参与的影响相对于男性更大。但主要的鸿沟与其说是在男性和女性之间，不如说是在受教育程度较高和较低的人群之间。与许多说法相反，女性并未大规模退出劳动力市场，她们的工作时间也没有大幅减少。女性总体劳动力参与率并未骤降。平衡照护与工作的能力因教育、职业和种族而异。受教育程度较高的人可以居家工作。那些在疫情初期受雇于各种面对面“服务”行业和机构的人，经历了就业的大幅减少。在考虑了其他因素后，黑人女性受到的负面影响更大，而COVID-19的健康影响是一个可能的原因。对疫情影响的估计取决于所使用的反事实。疫情期间女性的真实故事涉及这样一个事实：在职女性既要教育孩子，又要照顾父母的成年女儿承受着压力，是因为她们仍在劳动力队伍中，而不是因为她们离开了。
29974.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LS；JEL：J0, J20, J21, J22

29973.title: The Trade Reform Wave of 1985-1995
29973.abstract: The decade from 1985 to 1995 was an unprecedented period of declining barriers to global trade. The reform wave was especially pronounced in developing countries where overvalued currencies were eliminated, quantitative import restrictions dismantled, and import tariffs reduced. What accounts for this remarkable transformation in policy? This paper focuses on how many of these restrictions were imposed for balance of payments purposes. As the benefits of managing payments imbalances through exchange rate adjustments rather than import controls came to be understood, economists in high-ranking government positions had the opportunity to shift policy in this direction. Perhaps surprisingly, special interests played little role in fostering the move to more open markets.
29973.zh_abstract: 从1985年到1995年的十年间，是全球贸易壁垒空前减少的时期。改革浪潮在发展中国家尤为显著，这些国家取消了高估的货币，废除了数量进口限制，并降低了进口关税。是什么导致了这一显著的政策转变？本文重点关注其中许多限制是如何出于国际收支目的而实施的。随着通过汇率调整而非进口管制来管理支付失衡的好处逐渐被理解，身居政府高位的经济学家有机会将政策朝这个方向转变。或许令人惊讶的是，特殊利益集团在推动市场更加开放方面几乎没有发挥作用。

29972.title: An Evaluation of the Paycheck Protection Program Using Administrative Payroll Microdata
29972.zh_title: 使用行政工资微观数据对薪资保护计划的评估
29972.authors: David Autor, David Cho, Leland D. Crane, Mita Goldar, Byron Lutz, Joshua K. Montes, William B. Peterman, David D. Ratner, Daniel Villar Vallenas, Ahu Yildirmaz
29972.abstract: The Paycheck Protection Program (PPP), a principal element of the fiscal stimulus enacted by Congress during the COVID-19 pandemic, aimed to assist small businesses to maintain employment and wages during the crisis. We use high-frequency administrative payroll data from ADP--one of the world’s largest payroll processing firms--to estimate the causal effect of the PPP on the evolution of employment at PPP-eligible firms relative to PPP-ineligible firms, where eligibility is determined by industry-specific firm-size cutoffs. We estimate that the PPP boosted employment at eligible firms by between 2 percent to 5 percent at its peak in mid-2020, with this effect waning to 0 to 3 percent throughout the remainder of the year. Employers retained an estimated additional 3.6 million jobs due to the PPP as of mid-May 2020, and 1.4 million jobs at the end of 2020. The implied cost per year of employment retained was $\$169,000$ to $\$258,000,$ equal to 3.4 to 5.2 times median earnings.
29972.zh_abstract: 薪资保护计划是美国国会在COVID-19疫情期间颁布的财政刺激措施的主要组成部分，旨在帮助小企业在危机期间维持就业和工资。我们使用来自ADP（全球最大的薪资处理公司之一）的高频行政工资数据，来估计薪资保护计划对符合条件企业相对于不符合条件企业就业变化的因果效应，其中资格由特定行业的公司规模临界值决定。我们估计，薪资保护计划在2020年年中达到顶峰时，使符合条件企业的就业增加了2%至5%，这一效应在当年剩余时间内减弱至0%至3%。截至2020年5月中旬，雇主因薪资保护计划额外保留了约360万个工作岗位，到2020年底保留了140万个工作岗位。每保留一年就业的隐含成本为169,000至258,000美元，相当于收入中位数的3.4至5.2倍。
29972.meta: Programs：LS, ME, PE；JEL：E24, H25, H32, H81, J38

29971.title: The Narrow Channel of Quantitative Easing: Evidence from YCC Down Under
29971.zh_title: 量化宽松的狭窄渠道：来自澳大利亚收益率曲线控制的证据
29971.abstract: We study the recent Australian experience with yield curve control (YCC) of government bonds as perhaps the best evidence of how this policy might work in other developed economies. We interpret the evidence with a simple model in which YCC affects prices of both government and other bonds via “broad” transmission channels, but only government bond prices through “narrow” liquidity channels. YCC seemingly worked well in 2020 while the market expected short rates to stay at zero for long. But as the global recovery and inflation gained momentum in 2021, liftoff expectations moved up, the Reserve Bank of Australia purchased most of the outstanding amount of the targeted government bond, and its yield dislocated from other financial market instruments. The model and empirical evidence point to narrow transmission channels playing more prominent roles than broad channels considered in prior studies of quantitative easing (QE), such as portfolio balance effects and signaling about short term rates. We argue that asset-specific narrow channels may be primary transmission mechanisms of quantity-based QE policies as well.
29971.zh_abstract: 我们研究了澳大利亚近期对政府债券的收益率曲线控制经验，这可能是该政策如何在其他发达经济体发挥作用的最佳证据。我们用一个简单模型来解释这些证据，该模型中收益率曲线控制通过“广泛”传导渠道影响政府债券和其他债券的价格，但仅通过“狭窄”流动性渠道影响政府债券价格。收益率曲线控制在2020年似乎运行良好，当时市场预期短期利率将长期维持在零水平。但随着2021年全球复苏和通胀势头增强，加息预期上升，澳大利亚储备银行购买了大部分目标政府债券的未偿余额，其收益率与其他金融工具脱节。该模型和实证证据表明，与先前量化宽松研究中考虑的广泛渠道（如投资组合平衡效应和关于短期利率的信号传递）相比，狭窄传导渠道发挥了更突出的作用。我们认为，资产特定的狭窄渠道也可能是基于数量的量化宽松政策的主要传导机制。
29971.meta: Programs：AP, ME；JEL：C32, E43, E52, G12, G14

29970.title: Causal Effects of Countercyclical Interest Rates: Evidence from the Classical Gold Standard
29970.zh_title: 逆周期利率的因果效应：来自古典金本位制的证据
29970.authors: Kris James Mitchener, Gonçalo Alves Pina
29970.abstract: We estimate the causal impact of countercyclical interest rates on macroeconomic outcomes in open economies. To identify countercyclical interest rates, we construct a new database of short-term interest rates, principal exports, and international commodity prices for 40 economies from 1870 to 1913. This era of capital mobility, nominal anchors, specialization and trade integration, exposed economies to multiple exogenous demand-side shocks. Specialization and trade integration subjected economies to a “commodity lottery” in the form of price fluctuations in world markets. Capital mobility and a currency peg exposed them to interest-rate movements originating in the U.K., the largest economy and linchpin of the classical gold standard. We identify (i) positive effects of commodity-export prices on real GDP and the domestic price level and (ii) negative effects of exogenous changes in short-term interest rates on the same variables. We then show that countercyclical interest rates, defined relative to export-price shocks, stabilized both output and the domestic price level. This stabilization was more effective for the price level than for output.
29970.zh_abstract: 我们估计了开放经济体中逆周期利率对宏观经济结果的因果影响。为了识别逆周期利率，我们构建了一个新的数据库，包含1870年至1913年间40个经济体的短期利率、主要出口商品和国际商品价格。这个资本流动、名义锚、专业化和贸易一体化的时代，使经济体面临多种外生需求侧冲击。专业化和贸易一体化使经济体面临世界市场价格波动的“商品彩票”。资本流动和货币挂钩使它们面临源自英国（最大经济体和古典金本位制的关键）的利率变动。我们识别出（i）商品出口价格对实际GDP和国内价格水平的正向影响，以及（ii）短期利率外生变化对相同变量的负向影响。然后我们表明，相对于出口价格冲击定义的逆周期利率，稳定了产出和国内价格水平。这种稳定对价格水平比对产出更有效。
29970.meta: Programs：DAE, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, E52, F33, F41, N10

29969.title: The Demand For Protection and the Persistently High Rates of Gun Violence Among Young Black Males
29969.zh_title: 保护需求与年轻黑人男性枪支暴力持续高发
29969.authors: William N. Evans, Maciej H. Kotowski
29969.abstract: We develop a theoretical model to explain both the high level and persistence in gun violence for black males ages 15–24 consistent with the empirical literature. A person may carry a gun for instrumental (i.e., criminal) reasons or for its perceived protective benefit. Discerning underlying motives is difficult. A shock to the instrumental benefit can move the equilibrium to one with a high gun prevalence. The model demonstrates that there are larger returns to reducing the value of guns for crime than trying to reduce their protective benefit, suggesting different policy paths to combat the problem of gun violence.
29969.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个理论模型，以解释15-24岁黑人男性枪支暴力水平高且持续存在的现象，这与实证文献一致。一个人携带枪支可能是出于工具性（即犯罪）原因，也可能是为了其感知到的保护性益处。辨别潜在动机是困难的。对工具性收益的冲击可以将均衡推向枪支普遍率高的状态。该模型表明，降低枪支犯罪价值的回报大于试图降低其保护性益处的回报，这表明应对枪支暴力问题存在不同的政策路径。

29968.title: Are Cryptocurrencies Currencies? Bitcoin as Legal Tender in El Salvador
29968.zh_title: 加密货币是货币吗？萨尔瓦多的比特币法定货币化
29968.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, David Argente, Diana Van Patten
29968.abstract: A currency’s essential feature is to be a medium of exchange. We leverage a quasi-natural experiment—El Salvador as the ﬁrst country to make bitcoin legal tender—to study a cryptocurrency’s potential to be used in daily transactions. The government also launched and provided incentives to download and use a digital wallet named Chivo, which shares features with Central Bank Digital Currencies (CBDCs) and allows users to trade bitcoin and dollars. Were Chivo Wallet and bitcoin actually adopted after this “big push”? Conducting a representative face-to-face survey and relying on blockchain data to obtain all Chivo transactions, we document how usage of digital payments and bitcoin is low, concentrated, and has been decreasing over time. We ﬁnd that privacy concerns are key barriers to adoption, which speaks to a policy debate on crypto and CBDCs that has had anonymity at its core. We also estimate the technology’s adoption cost and its network externalities.
29968.zh_abstract: 货币的基本特征在于充当交换媒介。我们利用一个准自然实验——萨尔瓦多作为首个将比特币定为法定货币的国家——来研究加密货币在日常交易中的潜在应用。政府还推出并激励下载和使用一款名为Chivo的数字钱包，该钱包兼具央行数字货币（CBDCs）的特征，允许用户交易比特币和美元。在这次“大推动”之后，Chivo钱包和比特币是否真的被采纳了？通过开展具有代表性的面对面调查，并依赖区块链数据获取所有Chivo交易，我们记录了数字支付和比特币的使用率低、集中且随时间推移而下降的情况。我们发现隐私问题是采纳的关键障碍，这关系到一场以匿名性为核心的关于加密货币和CBDCs的政策辩论。我们还估算了该技术的采纳成本及其网络外部性。

29967.title: Interdependent Preferences and the Mitigation of Market Failure
29967.zh_title: 相互依赖偏好与市场失灵缓解
29967.abstract: I consider the effect of caring, empathy, altruism or positive reciprocity towards others - which I collectively call positive preference interdependence (PPI) - on the internalization of interpersonal externalities and on the level of private contributions to the provision of public goods. I show that if preferences depend positively on the well-being of others, then in an extreme case external effects are fully internalized, and private contributions to the provision of a public good will be sufficient for it to be provided at an efficient level. Furthermore I show that when PPI is less than perfect, an increase in the level shown by any agent will lead to a Pareto improvement in the case of interpersonal externalities and an increase in the level of provision of the public good, and that as PPI levels increase towards their upper bound, the level of provision of the public good converges to the efficient level. An increase in caring, empathy, altruism or positive reciprocity, an increase in PPI, in the presence of externalities or public goods is Pareto improving. As it is well-documented that people display some degree of PPI, it is arguable that our failure to provide public goods optimally or to manage externalities efficiently is attributable to lack of empathy/altruism/positive reciprocity as well as to the free rider problem.
29967.zh_abstract: 我考虑了对他人的关心、共情、利他主义或正向互惠（我统称为正向偏好相互依赖，PPI）对人际外部性内部化以及私人对公共品提供贡献水平的影响。我证明，如果偏好正向依赖于他人的福祉，那么在极端情况下，外部效应将被完全内部化，私人对公共品提供的贡献将足以使其以有效水平被提供。此外，我表明当PPI不完美时，任何代理人表现出的PPI水平提高，在人际外部性情形下将导致帕累托改进，并提高公共品的提供水平；并且随着PPI水平向其上限趋近，公共品的提供水平将收敛于有效水平。在存在外部性或公共品的情况下，关心、共情、利他主义或正向互惠的增加，即PPI的增加，是帕累托改进的。由于有充分证据表明人们表现出一定程度的PPI，可以说我们未能最优地提供公共品或有效管理外部性，既归因于缺乏共情/利他主义/正向互惠，也归因于搭便车问题。
29967.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：D6, D64, D9, H23, H41

29966.title: Career Concerns and the Dynamics of Electoral Accountability
29966.zh_title: 职业关切与选举问责的动态机制
29966.authors: Matias Iaryczower, Adam Meirowitz, Gabriel Lopez-Moctezuma
29966.abstract: Quantifying the value that legislators give to reelection relative to policy is crucial to understanding electoral accountability. We estimate the preferences for office and policy of members of the US Senate, using a structural approach that exploits variation in polls, position-taking and advertising throughout the electoral cycle. We then combine these preference estimates with estimates of the electoral effectiveness of policy moderation and political advertising to quantify electoral accountability in competitive and uncompetitive elections. We find that senators differ markedly in the value they give to securing office relative to policy gains: while over a fourth of senators are highly ideological, a sizable number of senators are willing to make relatively large policy concessions to attain electoral gains. Nevertheless, electoral accountability is only moderate on average, due to the relatively low impact of changes in senators’ policy stance on voter support.
29966.zh_abstract: 量化立法者相对于政策目标对连任赋予的价值，对于理解选举问责至关重要。我们采用结构性方法，利用整个选举周期中民调、立场表态和广告宣传的变化，估算了美国参议院议员对职位和政策的偏好。然后，我们将这些偏好估计与政策温和化及政治广告的选举有效性估计相结合，以量化竞争性和非竞争性选举中的选举问责。我们发现，参议员在确保职位相对于政策收益所赋予的价值上存在显著差异：虽然超过四分之一的参议员高度意识形态化，但也有相当数量的参议员愿意做出相对较大的政策让步以获取选举收益。然而，由于参议员政策立场变化对选民支持的影响相对较小，平均而言选举问责仅处于中等水平。

29965.title: Representation Failure
29965.authors: Matias Iaryczower, Sergio Montero, Galileu Kim
29965.abstract: Democratic representation is constrained by the alternatives available to voters. In this paper, we develop a methodology to gauge the extent to which the “supply side” of politics hinders voter welfare. Using rich data on thousands of candidates in three Brazilian legislative elections, we quantify the relative value voters place on candidates’ policy positions and non-ideological attributes, and we evaluate voters’ welfare given the set of candidates they face. Our estimates uncover substantial welfare losses to voters relative to three alternative benchmarks of ideal representation. On average, the typical voter suffers only a moderate loss due to policy incongruence but a large loss due to shortages in candidates’ non-ideological characteristics. To evaluate the welfare consequences of potential institutional reforms, we develop and estimate a model of equilibrium policy determination. Through counterfactual experiments, we show that institutional reforms aimed at improving the quality of representation may have sizable unintended consequences due to equilibrium policy adjustments.
29965.zh_abstract: 民主代表性受到选民可获得的备选方案的限制。在本文中，我们开发了一种方法来衡量政治的“供给方”在多大程度上损害了选民福利。利用巴西三次立法选举中数千名候选人的丰富数据，我们量化了选民对候选人政策立场和非意识形态属性的相对价值评估，并评估了选民在面对他们所面临的候选人集合时的福利。我们的估计发现，相对于三个理想代表性的基准情景，选民遭受了显著的福利损失。平均而言，典型选民因政策不一致而遭受的损失仅为中等程度，但因候选人非意识形态特征短缺而遭受的损失则很大。为了评估潜在制度改革的福利后果，我们开发并估计了一个均衡政策决定模型。通过反事实实验，我们表明旨在提高代表性的制度改革可能因均衡政策调整而产生相当大的意外后果。

29964.title: What the Students for Fair Admissions Cases Reveal About Racial Preferences
29964.zh_title: 学生公平录取案揭示了关于种族偏好的什么
29964.authors: Peter Arcidiacono, Josh Kinsler, Tyler Ransom
29964.abstract: Using detailed admissions data made public in the SFFA v. Harvard and SFFA v. UNC cases, we examine how racial preferences for under-represented minorities (URMs) aﬀect their admissions to Harvard and UNC-Chapel Hill. At Harvard, the admit rates for typical African American applicants are on average over four times larger than if they had been treated as white. For typical Hispanic applicants the increase is 2.4 times. At UNC, preferences vary substantially by whether the applicant is in-state or out-of-state. For in-state applicants, racial preferences result in an over 70% increase in the African American admit rate. For out-of-state applicants, the increase is more than tenfold. Both universities provide larger racial preferences to URMs from higher socioeconomic backgrounds.
29964.zh_abstract: 利用SFFA诉哈佛案和SFFA诉UNC案中公开的详细招生数据，我们研究了针对弱势少数族裔（URMs）的种族偏好如何影响他们进入哈佛大学和北卡罗来纳大学教堂山分校的录取。在哈佛大学，典型非裔美国申请者的录取率平均比他们被视为白人时高出四倍以上。对于典型的西班牙裔申请者，这一增幅为2.4倍。在UNC，偏好因申请者是州内还是州外而有显著差异。对于州内申请者，种族偏好导致非裔美国人的录取率增加超过70%。对于州外申请者，增幅超过十倍。两所大学都为来自较高社会经济背景的URMs提供了更大的种族偏好。

29963.title: Is the Price Right? The Role of Economic Tradeoffs in Explaining Reactions to Price Surges
29963.zh_title: 价格合理吗？经济权衡在解释对价格飙升反应中的作用
29963.authors: Julio J. Elias, Nicola Lacetera, Mario Macis
29963.abstract: Public authorities often introduce price controls following price surges, potentially causing inefficiencies and exacerbating shortages. A survey experiment with 7,612 Canadian and US respondents shows that unregulated price surges raise moral objections and widespread disapproval. However, acceptance increases, and demand for regulation decreases when participants are prompted to consider economic tradeoffs between controlled and unregulated prices, whereby incentives from higher prices lead to additional supply and enhance access to goods. Moreover, highlighting these tradeoffs reduces polarization in moral judgments between supporters and opponents of unregulated pricing. Textual analysis of responses to open-ended questions provides further insights into our findings, and an incentivized donation task demonstrates consistency between stated preferences and real-stakes behavior. Although economic trade-offs do influence public support for price control policies, the evidence indicates that, even when the potential gains in economic efficiency from unregulated prices are explicit, a significant divide persists between the utilitarian views that standard economic thinking implies, and the non-utilitarian values held by the general population.
29963.zh_abstract: 公共当局通常在价格飙升后引入价格管制，这可能导致效率低下并加剧短缺。一项针对7612名加拿大和美国受访者的调查实验表明，不受管制的价格飙升引发了道德反对和广泛的不满。然而，当参与者被提示考虑管制价格与不受管制价格之间的经济权衡时——即更高价格带来的激励会引致额外供给并改善商品获取——接受度增加，对监管的需求减少。此外，强调这些权衡减少了支持者和反对者之间在道德判断上的两极分化。对开放式问题回答的文本分析进一步揭示了我们的发现，一项激励性捐赠任务显示了陈述偏好与实际利益行为之间的一致性。尽管经济权衡确实影响了公众对价格管制政策的支持，但证据表明，即使不受管制价格可能带来的经济效率提升是明确的，标准经济思维所隐含的功利主义观点与普通民众所持有的非功利主义价值观之间仍然存在显著分歧。
29963.meta: Programs：EH, PE, PR；JEL：C83, C91, D63, D91, I11, L50, Z1

29962.title: Learning Through Imitation: an Experiment
29962.zh_title: 通过模仿学习：一项实验
29962.authors: Marina Agranov, Gabriel Lopez-Moctezuma, Philipp Strack, Omer Tamuz
29962.abstract: We compare how well agents aggregate information in two repeated social learning environments. In the first setting agents have access to a public data set. In the second they have access to the same data, and also to the past actions of others. Despite the fact that actions contain no additional payoff relevant information, and despite potential herd behavior, free riding and information overload issues, observing and imitating the actions of others leads agents to take the optimal action more often in the second setting. We also investigate the effect of group size, as well as a setting in which agents observe private data and others’ actions.
29962.zh_abstract: 我们比较了代理人在两种重复社会学习环境中聚合信息的能力。在第一种环境中，代理人可以访问一个公共数据集。在第二种环境中，他们可以访问相同的数据，以及他人过去的行为。尽管行为不包含额外的与收益相关的信息，并且尽管存在潜在的羊群行为、搭便车和信息过载问题，观察和模仿他人的行为使得代理人在第二种环境中更频繁地采取最优行动。我们还研究了群体规模的影响，以及一种代理人观察私人数据与他人行为的环境。

29961.title: Optimal Taxation of Risky Entrepreneurial Capital
29961.zh_title: 风险创业资本的最优税收
29961.abstract: We study optimal taxation in a model with endogenous financial frictions, risky investment and occupational choice, where the wealth distribution affects how efficiently capital is used. The planner chooses linear taxes on wealth, capital and labor income to maximize the steady state utility of a newborn agent. Most agents in the model are poor, leading to an equity motive for taxation. We calibrate the model to the US economy and find low positive levels of optimal capital income and wealth taxes. We express optimal tax rates as a closed-form function of the size of tax bases and their elasticities with respect to tax rates, highlighting the forces behind the result. Because financial frictions are endogenous, higher capital income tax rates tighten financial frictions and reduce output. Thus, optimal capital income taxes are lower than in models with exogenous frictions.
29961.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个包含内生金融摩擦、风险投资和职业选择模型中的最优税收问题，其中财富分配影响资本使用效率。规划者选择对财富、资本和劳动收入的线性税收，以最大化新生代理人的稳态效用。模型中的大多数代理人较为贫困，这产生了税收的公平动机。我们将模型校准至美国经济，发现最优资本收入和财富税处于较低的正水平。我们将最优税率表示为税基规模及其对税率弹性的闭式函数，突出了结果背后的驱动力。由于金融摩擦是内生的，较高的资本收入税率会加剧金融摩擦并减少产出。因此，最优资本收入税低于外生摩擦模型中的水平。

29960.title: Neighborhood Choice After COVID: The Role of Rents, Amenities, and Work-From-Home
29960.zh_title: 新冠疫情后的邻里选择：租金、便利设施和居家办公的作用
29960.abstract: We investigate how neighborhood preferences and choices changed one year after the beginning of the COVID pandemic. We study a Neighborhood Choice Program that helped graduating students choose where to live by providing new information about rents and amenities. Using panel data on neighborhood rankings before and after information, we find that changes in rankings favor neighborhoods where social and professional network shares are higher by 2.2 percentage points, rents are lower by $\$432,$ and are 2.4 kilometers farther from the city center. Interestingly, we did not detect this movement away from downtowns when the program was offered prior to the pandemic. We then estimate a neighborhood choice model to recover MWTP for amenities both before and after the pandemic. Our estimates reveal that MWTP for network shares post COVID is markedly lower than prior to COVID. Finally, we perform counterfactuals to quantitatively assess how changes in preferences affect where people live, and find that weaker network preferences are most impactful, while heterogeneity by commute and work-from-home are less relevant.
29960.zh_abstract: 我们研究了新冠疫情开始一年后邻里偏好和选择的变化。我们考察了一个邻里选择项目，该项目通过提供关于租金和便利设施的新信息，帮助即将毕业的学生选择居住地点。利用信息获取前后邻里排名的面板数据，我们发现排名变化倾向于那些社交和职业网络份额高出2.2个百分点、租金低432美元、且距离市中心远2.4公里的邻里。有趣的是，当该项目在疫情前提供时，我们并未检测到这种远离市中心的迁移。随后，我们估计了一个邻里选择模型，以恢复疫情前后对便利设施的边际支付意愿。我们的估计显示，疫情后对网络份额的边际支付意愿显著低于疫情前。最后，我们进行了反事实分析，以定量评估偏好变化如何影响人们的居住地点，发现较弱的网络偏好影响最大，而通勤和居家办公的异质性则相关性较小。
29960.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, LS, PE；JEL：G0, H0, J0, R0

29959.title: Pharmacy Benefit Managers and Vertical Relationships in Drug Supply: State of Current Research
29959.zh_title: 药品福利管理及药品供应链中的纵向关系：当前研究状况
29959.authors: Zarek C. Brot-Goldberg, Catherine Che, Benjamin R. Handel
29959.abstract: Despite their importance to the supply of prescription drugs, there has been limited research on pharmacy benefit managers (PBMs) and their vertical relationships to insurers and drug manufacturers. This paper provides an overview of the current state of research on this topic, motivates why further research is needed, and discusses promising theoretical and empirical directions for that research.
29959.zh_abstract: 尽管药品福利管理及其与保险公司和药品制造商的纵向关系对处方药供应至关重要，但相关研究有限。本文概述了该主题的当前研究状况，阐述了为何需要进一步研究，并讨论了该研究在理论和实证方面有前景的方向。

29958.title: Pandemic-Era Uncertainty
29958.authors: Brent H. Meyer, Emil Mihaylov, Jose Maria Barrero, Steven J. Davis, David Altig, Nicholas Bloom
29958.abstract: We examine several measures of uncertainty to make five points. First, equity market traders and executives at nonfinancial firms have shared similar assessments about one-year-ahead uncertainty since the pandemic struck. Both the one-year VIX and our survey-based measure of firm-level uncertainty at a one-year forecast horizon doubled at the onset of the pandemic and then fell about half-way back to pre-pandemic levels by mid 2021. Second, and in contrast, the 1-month VIX, a Twitter-based Economic Uncertainty Index, and macro forecaster disagreement all rose sharply in reaction to the pandemic but retrenched almost completely by mid 2021. Third, Categorical Policy Uncertainty Indexes highlight the changing sources of uncertainty – from healthcare and fiscal policy uncertainty in spring 2020 to elevated uncertainty around monetary policy and national security as of March 2022. Fourth, firm-level risk perceptions skewed heavily to the downside in spring 2020 but shifted rapidly to the upside from fall 2020 onwards. Perceived upside uncertainty remains highly elevated as of early 2022. Fifth, our survey evidence suggests that elevated uncertainty is exerting only mild restraint on capital investment plans for 2022 and 2023, perhaps because perceived risks are so skewed to the upside.
29958.zh_abstract: 我们考察了几种不确定性衡量指标，得出五点结论。第一，自疫情爆发以来，股票市场交易者和非金融企业高管对一年期不确定性的评估相似。一年期VIX指数和我们基于调查的一年预测期企业层面不确定性衡量指标在疫情初期均翻倍，随后到2021年年中回落至疫情前水平的一半左右。第二，相比之下，一个月期VIX指数、基于推文的经济不确定性指数以及宏观预测者分歧度在疫情冲击下急剧上升，但到2021年年中几乎完全回落。第三，分类政策不确定性指数凸显了不确定性来源的变化——从2020年春季的医疗和财政政策不确定性，到2022年3月围绕货币政策和国家安全的不确定性上升。第四，企业层面的风险感知在2020年春季严重偏向下行，但从2020年秋季起迅速转向偏向上行。截至2022年初，感知到的上行不确定性仍然很高。第五，我们的调查证据表明，不确定性上升仅对2022年和2023年的资本投资计划施加了温和的抑制作用，这可能是因为感知风险如此偏向上行。

29999.title: Is the American Soft Power a Casualty of the Trade War?
29999.zh_title: 美国软实力是贸易战的牺牲品吗？
29999.authors: Haichao Fan, Yichuan Hu, Lixin Tang, Shang-Jin Wei
29999.abstract: The US trade war against China in 2018–2019 can either enhance or diminish the US soft power in China, depending on whether it is recognized as legitimate by Chinese citizens. We study how the viewership of US movies—an important element of the US soft power—is affected by the trade war, utilizing variations across Chinese cities in the exposure to the Trump tariffs. We find a significant reduction in US movie revenue in regions more exposed to the Trump tariffs, but no corresponding reduction in the consumption of non-US movies. This is corroborated by a decline in online search for US movies, US tourist destinations, and US branded sports shoes. The aversion to US movies appears to persist at least to 2021. The effect is somewhat milder for more affluent people.
29999.zh_abstract: 2018-2019年美国对华贸易战可能增强或削弱美国在中国的软实力，这取决于中国公民是否认为其具有合法性。我们利用中国各城市受特朗普关税影响程度的差异，研究美国电影观影量（美国软实力的重要组成部分）如何受到贸易战的影响。我们发现，在受特朗普关税影响更大的地区，美国电影收入显著下降，但非美国电影的消费没有相应减少。这一结果得到了美国电影、美国旅游目的地和美国品牌运动鞋在线搜索量下降的佐证。对美国电影的厌恶似乎至少持续到2021年。对于更富裕的人群，这种影响相对温和。

29998.title: The Inverse Hyperbolic Sine Transformation and Retransformed Marginal Effects
29998.zh_title: 反双曲正弦变换与再变换后的边际效应
29998.abstract: This paper shows how to calculate consistent marginal effects on the original scale of the outcome variable in Stata after estimating a linear regression with a dependent variable that has been transformed by the inverse hyperbolic sine function. The method uses a nonparametric retransformation of the error term and accounts for any scaling of the dependent variable. The inverse hyperbolic sine function is not invariant to scaling, which is known to shift marginal effects between those from an untransformed dependent variable to those of a log-transformed dependent variable.
29998.zh_abstract: 本文展示了在Stata中，对经过反双曲正弦函数变换的因变量进行线性回归估计后，如何计算原始尺度上一致的边际效应。该方法使用误差项的非参数再变换，并考虑了因变量的任何缩放。反双曲正弦函数对缩放不具有不变性，已知这会使边际效应在未变换因变量的边际效应与对数变换因变量的边际效应之间移动。

29997.title: Generalized Separability and Integrability: Consumer Demand with a Price Aggregator
29997.zh_title: 广义可分性与可积性：具有价格加总因子的消费者需求
29997.abstract: This paper examines demand systems where the demand for a good depends on other prices only through a common price aggregator (a scalar function of all prices). We refer to this property as ``generalized separability'' and provide the functional forms of demand that this property implies when demand is rational, i.e., derived from utility maximization. Generalized separability imposes restrictions on either income or price effects, and greater flexibility is obtained by adding indirect utility as an additional aggregator. We provide examples and applications which encompass a large variety of examples from the literature. In particular, generalized separability can be used in simple general-equilibrium models to obtain a more tractable framework and yet generate a wider range of effects of market size and productivity on firm size, entry, and prices.
29997.zh_abstract: 本文考察了这样一种需求系统，其中一种商品的需求仅通过一个共同的价格加总因子（所有价格的标量函数）依赖于其他价格。我们将此性质称为“广义可分性”，并提供了当需求是理性的（即源于效用最大化）时，该性质所隐含的需求函数形式。广义可分性对收入效应或价格效应施加了限制，通过将间接效用作为额外的加总因子可以获得更大的灵活性。我们提供了涵盖文献中大量例子的实例和应用。特别是，广义可分性可用于简单的一般均衡模型，以获得更易处理的框架，同时产生更广泛的市场规模和生产率对企业规模、进入和价格的影响。

29996.title: AI Adoption in a Competitive Market
29996.abstract: Economists have often viewed the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) as a standard process innovation where we expect that efficiency will drive adoption in competitive markets. This paper models AI based on recent advances in machine learning that allow firms to engage in better prediction. Using prediction of demand, it is demonstrated that AI adoption is a complement to variable inputs whose levels are directly altered by predictions and use is economised by them (that is, labour). It is shown that, in a competitive market, this increases the short-run elasticity of supply and may or may not increase average equilibrium prices. There are generically externalities in adoption with this reducing the profits of non-adoptees when variable inputs are important and increasing them otherwise. Thus, AI does not operate as a standard process innovation and its adoption may confer positive externalities on non-adopting firms. In the long-run, AI adoption is shown to generally lower prices and raise consumer surplus in competitive markets.
29996.zh_abstract: 经济学家通常将人工智能（AI）的采纳视为一种标准的过程创新，预期效率将推动其在竞争市场中的采纳。本文基于机器学习的最新进展对AI进行建模，这些进展使企业能够进行更好的预测。通过利用对需求的预测，我们证明AI采纳是对可变投入的互补，这些投入的水平直接受预测影响，并且其使用因预测而得到节约（即劳动力）。研究表明，在竞争市场中，这会提高短期供给弹性，并可能提高或可能不提高平均均衡价格。采纳通常存在外部性，当可变投入重要时，这会降低非采纳者的利润，否则会增加其利润。因此，AI并非作为标准的过程创新运作，其采纳可能对非采纳企业产生正外部性。长期来看，AI采纳被证明通常会降低价格并提高竞争市场中的消费者剩余。

29995.title: AI Adoption in a Monopoly Market
29995.abstract: The adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) prediction of demand by a monopolist firm is examined. It is shown that, in the absence of AI prediction, firms face complex trade-offs in setting price and quantity ahead of demand that impact on the returns of AI adoption. Different industrial environments with differing flexibility of prices and/or quantity ex post, also impact on AI returns as does the time horizon of AI prediction. While AI has positive benefits for firms in terms of profitability, its impact on average price and quantity, as well as consumer welfare, is more nuanced and critically dependent on environmental characteristics.
29995.zh_abstract: 本文考察了垄断企业对人工智能（AI）需求预测的采纳。研究表明，在没有AI预测的情况下，企业在需求实现前设定价格和数量时面临复杂的权衡，这会影响AI采纳的回报。事后价格和/或数量灵活性的不同产业环境，以及AI预测的时间跨度，也会影响AI回报。虽然AI在盈利能力方面对企业有积极益处，但其对平均价格和数量以及消费者福利的影响则更为微妙，并关键取决于环境特征。

29994.title: Climate Regulatory Risk and Corporate Bonds
29994.zh_title: 气候监管风险与公司债券
29994.authors: Lee H. Seltzer, Laura Starks, Qifei Zhu
29994.abstract: Concerns about climate risk suggest it should affect risk assessment and pricing of corporate securities, particularly for firms facing potential regulatory restrictions. Employing a shock to expected climate regulations, we find support for this hypothesis given our evidence that climate regulatory risks causally affect bond credit ratings and yield spreads. Moreover, a structural credit model indicates the increased spreads for high carbon issuers, especially those located in stricter regulatory environments, derive from changes in firms' asset volatilities rather than asset values, highlighting that regulatory uncertainty affects security pricing. The results have important implications for corporate decisions, portfolio management, and policymaking.
29994.zh_abstract: 对气候风险的担忧表明，它应影响公司证券的风险评估和定价，尤其是对于面临潜在监管限制的企业。利用预期气候监管的冲击，我们找到了支持这一假设的证据，表明气候监管风险因果性地影响债券信用评级和收益率利差。此外，一个结构性信用模型表明，高碳排放发行人（尤其是位于更严格监管环境中的发行人）利差的扩大源于企业资产波动率的变化而非资产价值的变化，这突显了监管不确定性对证券定价的影响。这些结果对企业决策、投资组合管理和政策制定具有重要意义。

29993.title: Demand Analysis under Latent Choice Constraints
29993.zh_title: 潜在选择约束下的需求分析
29993.abstract: Consumer choices are constrained in many markets due to either supply-side rationing or information frictions. Examples include matching markets for schools and colleges; entry-level labor markets; limited brand awareness and inattention in consumer markets; and selective admissions to healthcare services. We analyze a general random utility model for consumer preferences that allows for endogenous characteristics and a reduced-form choice-set formation rule that can be derived from models of the examples described above. We show non-parametric identification of this model, propose an estimator, and apply these methods to study admissions in the market for kidney dialysis in California. Our identification results require two sets of instruments, one that only affects consumer preferences and the other that only affects choice sets. We show that both instruments are necessary for identification. These results also suggest tests of choice-set constraints, which we apply to the dialysis market. We find that dialysis facilities are less likely to admit new patients when they have a higher-than-normal caseload and that patients are more likely to travel further when nearby facilities have high caseloads. Finally, we estimate consumers’ preferences and facilities’ rationing rules using a Gibbs sampler.
29993.zh_abstract: 在许多市场中，由于供给侧配给或信息摩擦，消费者选择受到约束。例如，学校和大学的匹配市场、入门级劳动力市场、消费者市场中有限的品牌认知和注意力不足，以及医疗服务的选择性准入。我们分析了一个通用的消费者偏好随机效用模型，该模型允许内生特征和一种简化形式的选择集形成规则，该规则可以从上述示例的模型中推导出来。我们展示了该模型的非参数识别，提出了一种估计量，并将这些方法应用于研究加利福尼亚州肾透析市场的准入问题。我们的识别结果需要两组工具变量，一组仅影响消费者偏好，另一组仅影响选择集。我们表明，这两组工具变量对于识别都是必要的。这些结果还提出了对选择集约束的检验，我们将其应用于透析市场。我们发现，当透析机构的病例量高于正常水平时，它们接纳新患者的可能性较低，而当附近机构的病例量较高时，患者更有可能前往更远的地方。最后，我们使用吉布斯采样器估计了消费者的偏好和机构的配给规则。

29992.title: Dangerous Prescribing and Healthcare Fragmentation: Evidence from Opioids
29992.zh_title: 危险处方与医疗碎片化：来自阿片类药物的证据
29992.authors: Keith Marzilli Ericson, Adam Sacarny, R. Annetta Zhou
29992.abstract: Fragmented healthcare received from many different physicians results in higher costs and lower quality, but does it contribute to dangerous opioid prescribing? The effect is theoretically ambiguous because fragmentation can trigger costly coordination failures but also permits greater specialization. We examine dangerous opioid prescribing, defined as receiving high dosages, long prescription durations, or harmfully interacting medications. Cross-sectionally, regions with higher fragmentation have lower levels of dangerous opioid prescribing. This relationship is associational and may result from unobserved patient-level confounders. Identifying the impact of healthcare fragmentation by examining patients who move across regions, we find a relatively precise null effect of fragmentation on dangerous opioid prescribing. These results cast doubt on the role of fragmentation in this phenomenon and highlight the potential role of other forces in driving it.
29992.zh_abstract: 由多位不同医生提供的碎片化医疗服务会导致更高的成本和更低的质量，但它是否会导致危险的阿片类药物处方？其影响在理论上是不明确的，因为碎片化可能引发代价高昂的协调失败，但也允许更大的专业化。我们研究了危险的阿片类药物处方，定义为接受高剂量、长处方持续时间或有害相互作用的药物。从横截面来看，碎片化程度较高的地区，危险阿片类药物处方的水平较低。这种关系是关联性的，可能源于未观测到的患者层面混杂因素。通过考察跨地区迁移的患者来识别医疗碎片化的影响，我们发现碎片化对危险阿片类药物处方的影响相对精确地为零。这些结果对碎片化在这一现象中的作用提出了质疑，并强调了其他力量在驱动该现象中的潜在作用。

29991.title: Property Rights in Historical Political Economy: When do Wedges Wither?
29991.zh_title: 历史政治经济学中的产权：楔子何时消失？
29991.abstract: Countries are not equally developed in large part because most countries face sets of property rights that do not foster growth despite the aggregate gains that would result from changing property rights. The difference in rents to society between the extant set of property rights and some seemingly better alternative we define as a “Demsetz” wedge. We explore the forces that sustain the status quo as well the forces that prompt property rights to change.
29991.zh_abstract: 各国发展不均衡，很大程度上是因为大多数国家面临着一套无法促进增长的产权制度，尽管改变产权制度会带来总体收益。我们将现有产权制度与某种看似更好的替代方案之间的社会租金差异定义为“德姆塞茨楔子”。我们探讨了维持现状的力量以及促使产权变革的力量。

29990.title: Measuring Knowledge and Learning
29990.abstract: Empirical studies in the economics of education, the measurement of skill gaps, the impacts of interventions on skill formation, and the value-added literature rely on psychometrically validated test scores. Test scores are taken as measures of an invariant scale of human capital compared over time and people. We examine if conventional skill measures are comparable on mastery of specific task knowledge. An unusually rich dataset from an early childhood intervention is used to test the assumption of scale invariance. We reject the scale invariance hypothesis for multiple skills and cast doubt on the uncritical use of test scores in research.
29990.zh_abstract: 教育经济学、技能差距测量、干预措施对技能形成的影响以及增值效应文献中的实证研究，都依赖于经过心理测量学验证的测试分数。测试分数被视为衡量随时间变化和跨人群比较的人力资本不变尺度的指标。我们检验了传统技能测量在特定任务知识掌握方面是否具有可比性。我们使用来自一项早期儿童干预的异常丰富的数据集来检验尺度不变性的假设。我们拒绝了多种技能的尺度不变性假设，并对研究中不加批判地使用测试分数提出了质疑。

29989.title: On Wars, Sanctions and Sovereign Default
29989.zh_title: 论战争、制裁与主权违约
29989.abstract: This paper explores the role of restrictions on the use of international reserves as economic sanctions. We develop a simple model of the strategic game between a sanctioning (creditor) country and a sanctioned (debtor) country. We characterize how the sanctioning country should impose restrictions optimally, internalizing the geopolitical benefits and the potential losses of a default by the sanctioned country. A calibrated version of the model can account for the sequence of events leading to the Russian default. Moreover, it suggests that for every dollar of economic damage inflicted to Russia, the US is willing to give up 0.50 dollars of its own consumption.
29989.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了限制使用国际储备作为经济制裁的作用。我们建立了一个简单的模型，描述制裁国（债权国）与被制裁国（债务国）之间的战略博弈。我们刻画了制裁国应如何最优地施加限制，内化地考虑地缘政治收益和被制裁国违约的潜在损失。该模型的校准版本可以解释导致俄罗斯违约的一系列事件。此外，它表明，美国为了对俄罗斯造成每一美元的经济损害，愿意放弃自己0.50美元的消费。

29988.title: Why Does Disability Increase During Recessions? Evidence from Medicare
29988.zh_title: 为什么经济衰退期间残疾率会上升？来自医疗保险的证据
29988.authors: Colleen Carey, Nolan H. Miller, David Molitor
29988.abstract: Social Security Disability Insurance (DI) awards rise in recessions, especially for workers over age 50. We use Medicare data to investigate how health, entry costs, and age-based DI eligibility rules shape this pattern. Recession-induced entrants have lower medical spending and mortality than typical recipients. The entry response to unemployment jumps 2–4 fold at ages 50 and 55, when eligibility rules relax. Using these age-based discontinuities as instruments, we find no difference in marginal entrants’ health across unemployment levels. These findings demonstrate that DI’s age-based eligibility rules play a major role in driving cyclical entry, while health shocks do not.
29988.zh_abstract: 社会保障残疾保险（DI）的发放在经济衰退期间会增加，尤其是对于50岁以上的工人。我们使用医疗保险数据来研究健康状况、进入成本和基于年龄的DI资格规则如何塑造这一模式。经济衰退引发的DI新进入者，其医疗支出和死亡率低于典型受助者。在50岁和55岁时，当资格规则放宽时，DI进入对失业的反应会跃升2到4倍。使用这些基于年龄的不连续性作为工具变量，我们发现不同失业水平下边际进入者的健康状况没有差异。这些发现表明，DI基于年龄的资格规则在推动周期性进入方面起着主要作用，而健康冲击则不然。

29987.title: Who Protests, What Do They Protest, and Why?
29987.zh_title: 谁在抗议，抗议什么，以及为什么？
29987.authors: Erica Chenoweth, Barton H. Hamilton, Hedwig Lee, Nicholas W. Papageorge, Stephen P. Roll, Matthew V. Zahn
29987.abstract: We examine individuals’ decision to attend Black Lives Matter protests and demonstrations calling for less stringent public health measures to combat COVID-19 (e.g., for swifter reopening of businesses). Our analysis is facilitated by a unique staggered panel data set originally constructed to study the socioeconomic impacts of COVID-19. A wave of data collected in the summer of 2020 was expanded to capture details about protest attendance, political views, and support for different movements. We find that protests may provide novel and policy relevant information about potentially widely-held and mainstream social preferences that are obscured by extremist politics. We present evidence that protesters are a diverse yet representative part of the population and that the decision to protest is deliberate in the sense that it is responsive to incentives and issue salience. We also provide novel evidence of movement overlap—attending a Black Lives Matter protest is associated with a higher likelihood of attending a protest calling for fewer public health restrictions. This finding counters typical narratives characterizing these two protest movements as diametrically opposed. In a political landscape dominated by the voices of extremists, our findings suggest we can draw a line between recent protest behavior and a less radical and less extreme majority (sometimes called the “exhausted” majority) that espouses more nuanced views than the politicians, policymakers and institutions that are supposed to represent them.
29987.zh_abstract: 我们考察了个人参加“黑人的命也是命”抗议活动以及呼吁采取不那么严格的公共卫生措施来抗击COVID-19（例如，要求更快地重新开放企业）的示威活动的决定。我们的分析得益于一个独特的分层面板数据集，该数据集最初是为了研究COVID-19的社会经济影响而构建的。2020年夏季收集的一波数据被扩展，以捕捉关于抗议参与、政治观点和对不同运动支持的详细信息。我们发现，抗议活动可能提供新颖且与政策相关的信息，这些信息涉及可能被极端政治掩盖的、广泛持有且主流的社會偏好。我们提供的证据表明，抗议者是人口中多样化但具有代表性的一部分，并且抗议的决定是深思熟虑的，因为它对激励和议题显著性有反应。我们还提供了运动重叠的新证据——参加“黑人的命也是命”抗议活动与参加要求减少公共卫生限制的抗议活动的可能性更高相关。这一发现与通常将这两场抗议运动描述为截然对立的典型叙事相悖。在一个被极端分子声音主导的政治格局中，我们的发现表明，我们可以在近期的抗议行为与一个不那么激进、不那么极端的多数群体（有时被称为“疲惫的”多数群体）之间划清界限，这个群体持有比那些本应代表他们的政治家、政策制定者和机构更微妙的观点。

29986.title: The Macroeconomic Expectations of U.S. Managers
29986.zh_title: 美国管理者的宏观经济预期
29986.authors: Ethan M. L. McClure, Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko
29986.abstract: Using responses obtained through the Nielsen Homescan panel survey, we explore the differences between managers’ and non-managers’ expectations and perceptions of inflation and unemployment. By and large, managers and non-managers exhibit similar average inflation and unemployment expectations as well as similar levels of disagreement and sensitivity to information provided in a randomized control trial. Finally, the inflation expectations of managers deviate systematically from the predictions of “anchored” expectations.
29986.zh_abstract: 利用通过尼尔森家庭扫描面板调查获得的回答，我们探讨了管理者与非管理者在通胀和失业预期及感知上的差异。总体而言，管理者和非管理者表现出相似的平均通胀和失业预期，以及在随机对照试验中提供的信息的敏感性和分歧程度也相似。最后，管理者的通胀预期系统地偏离了“锚定”预期的预测。

29985.title: Investing in Early Childhood Development in Preschool and at Home
29985.zh_title: 投资于学前与家庭中的儿童早期发展
29985.authors: Greg Duncan, Ariel Kalil, Magne Mogstad, Mari Rege
29985.abstract: The foundations for successful child development are established in early childhood. Two main policy approaches for strengthening these foundations have been subsidized preschool programs and programs targeting the home environment. Our chapter reviews a large body of empirical work investigating whether these programs make a difference for children’s development, and if so, how and under what conditions do they help, how cost-effective are they, and which programs are scalable. We start by reviewing studies that estimate how much of the variation in child outcomes can be explained by genetics versus environmental factors. These studies demonstrate that variation in environmental factors plays a key role in explaining individual life outcomes. This suggests that early childhood programs might play a significant role in helping children realize their potential in life. Nevertheless, our review of early childhood programs demonstrates that the evidence is mixed – some programs are successful in fostering lasting skill development, but many are not. We conclude that existing research on early childhood education falls short of sufficiently answering fundamental questions about what works for whom and why. A tighter link between theory, econometric methods and data is essential to compare and reconcile the mixed and sometimes conflicting empirical results across studies, and to understand when and why the impacts of home environment and pre-school interventions fadeout.
29985.zh_abstract: 成功儿童发展的基础在幼儿时期就已奠定。加强这些基础的两项主要政策途径是补贴性学前教育项目和针对家庭环境的项目。本章回顾了大量实证研究，探讨这些项目是否对儿童发展产生影响，如果有影响，它们如何以及在何种条件下发挥作用，其成本效益如何，以及哪些项目具有可扩展性。我们首先回顾了那些估计儿童结果变异中遗传因素与环境因素各占多大比例的研究。这些研究表明，环境因素的变异在解释个体人生结果方面起着关键作用。这暗示着儿童早期项目可能在帮助儿童实现其人生潜力方面扮演重要角色。然而，我们对儿童早期项目的回顾表明，证据是混杂的——有些项目成功地促进了持久的技能发展，但许多项目并未成功。我们得出结论，现有的关于幼儿教育的研究未能充分回答关于什么对谁有效以及为什么有效的基本问题。理论、计量经济学方法和数据之间更紧密的联系对于比较和调和不同研究中混杂且有时相互矛盾的实证结果，以及理解家庭环境和学前干预的影响何时以及为何会消退至关重要。

29984.title: Collective Hold-Up
29984.abstract: We consider dynamic processes of coalition formation in which a principal bargains sequentially with a group of agents. This problem is at the core of a variety of applications in economics and politics, including a lobbyist seeking to pass a bill, an entrepreneur setting up a start-up, or a firm seeking the approval of corrupt bureaucrats. We show that when the principal’s willingness to pay is high, strengthening the bargaining position of the agents generates delay and reduces agents’ welfare. This occurs in spite of the lack of informational asymmetries or discriminatory offers. When this collective action problem is severe enough, agents prefer to give up considerable bargaining power in favor of the principal.
29984.zh_abstract: 我们考虑一个委托人与一组代理人顺序讨价还价的联盟形成动态过程。这个问题是经济学和政治学中各种应用的核心，包括游说者试图通过法案、企业家创办初创企业、或公司寻求腐败官僚的批准。我们表明，当委托人的支付意愿很高时，加强代理人的谈判地位会导致延迟并降低代理人的福利。这种情况的发生尽管缺乏信息不对称或歧视性报价。当这种集体行动问题足够严重时，代理人宁愿放弃相当大的谈判权力以利于委托人。

29983.title: The Opioid Crisis, Health, Healthcare, and Crime: A Review Of Quasi-Experimental Economic Studies
29983.zh_title: 阿片类药物危机、健康、医疗保健与犯罪：准实验经济学研究综述
29983.authors: Johanna Catherine Maclean, Justine Mallatt, Christopher J. Ruhm, Kosali I. Simon
29983.abstract: Opioid use is one of the most substantial and long-lasting public health crises faced by the United States. This crisis, which began by the mid-1990s and continues through the time of writing, causes 136 fatal opioid overdoses each day and costs the U.S. at least $\$596$ billion each year. These numbers, while incredibly large, likely do not capture the full toll of the crisis on American society. In this study, we review quasi-experimental studies that examine the relationship between opioids and health and healthcare, and crime outcomes in the U.S. We focus on the U.S., a country particularly hard hit by the crisis which has adopted a broad array of policies aimed at curbing it. \nOur findings align with the general perception that the opioid crisis has negatively impacted a range of health outcomes and increased healthcare costs, with limited evidence that opioids (which are designed to reduce chronic pain) have enhanced work capacity or other metrics that might capture intended benefits from appropriate use of these medications. While opioids have worsened many health outcomes, the healthcare system played a role in the emergence of the epidemic and its continuation. Further, studies suggest that opioids increase crime, although the link is not as strong as has been observed in previous drug epidemics; this finding is consistent with the pharmacological difference between opioids and stimulant substances (e.g., cocaine) that dominated earlier drug epidemic periods characterized by higher levels of crime. Through the provision of treatment to address underlying addiction and the development of strategies to effectively curtail access to opioids, the healthcare system potentially has an important role in attempts to end the crisis.
29983.zh_abstract: 阿片类药物使用是美国面临的最重大且持久的公共卫生危机之一。这场始于1990年代中期并持续至撰写本文时的危机，每天导致136例致命性阿片类药物过量，每年给美国造成至少5960亿美元的损失。这些数字虽然巨大，但可能并未涵盖这场危机对美国社会造成的全部损失。在本研究中，我们回顾了考察美国阿片类药物与健康、医疗保健以及犯罪结果之间关系的准实验研究。我们重点关注美国，这个受危机打击尤其严重的国家，它已采取了一系列旨在遏制危机的广泛政策。我们的发现与普遍看法一致，即阿片类药物危机对一系列健康结果产生了负面影响，并增加了医疗保健成本，而有限的证据表明阿片类药物（旨在减轻慢性疼痛）增强了工作能力或其他可能捕捉到适当使用这些药物预期益处的指标。虽然阿片类药物恶化了许多健康结果，但医疗保健系统在疫情的出现及其持续中发挥了作用。此外，研究表明阿片类药物增加了犯罪，尽管这种联系不如之前药物疫情中观察到的那么强；这一发现与阿片类药物和兴奋剂物质（例如可卡因）之间的药理学差异一致，后者在以前以较高犯罪率为特征的药物疫情时期占主导地位。通过提供治疗以解决潜在的成瘾问题，并制定有效限制阿片类药物获取的策略，医疗保健系统在试图结束这场危机中可能扮演重要角色。

29982.title: The Fed's International Dollar Liquidity Facilities: New Evidence on Effects
29982.zh_title: 美联储的国际美元流动性便利：关于效果的新证据
29982.abstract: In March 2020, the Federal Reserve eased the terms on its standing swap lines in collaboration with other central banks, reactivated temporary swap agreements, and then introduced the new Foreign and International Monetary Authorities (FIMA) repo facility. We provide new evidence on how the central bank swap lines and FIMA repo facility reduce strains in global dollar funding markets and US Treasury markets during extreme stress events. These facilities are found to contribute to the narrowing of foreign exchange swap basis spreads and to reduce the sensitivity of global funding strain metrics to risk sentiment deterioration. Cross border flows through banks for excess liquidity support purposes are reduced in the near term, and the risk sensitivity of equity and bond fund flows declines. However, access to these facilities leave longer-term patterns of liquidity and capital flows across borders broadly unchanged. While official sector liquidity hoarding and “dash for cash” type of activity is expected to be lower with access to these facilities, initial evidence does not show general differential changes in foreign exchange reserve holdings by foreign central banks in line with the type of liquidity access.
29982.zh_abstract: 2020年3月，美联储与其他央行合作放宽了其常设互换额度的条款，重新启动了临时互换协议，随后推出了新的外国和国际货币当局（FIMA）回购便利。我们提供了关于央行互换额度和FIMA回购便利如何在极端压力事件期间减轻全球美元融资市场和美国国债市场压力的新证据。这些便利被发现有助于缩小外汇互换基差点差，并降低全球融资压力指标对风险情绪恶化的敏感性。通过银行进行的用于超额流动性支持的跨境流动在短期内减少，股票和债券基金流动的风险敏感性下降。然而，获得这些便利后，跨境流动性和资本流动的长期模式基本保持不变。虽然预计获得这些便利后，官方部门的流动性囤积和“争抢现金”类活动会减少，但初步证据并未显示外国央行外汇储备持有量根据流动性获取类型出现普遍的差异性变化。

29981.title: The Design of Defined Contribution Plans
29981.abstract: Defined contribution plans are a major vehicle for retirement savings in the US, holding almost $\$10$ trillion in assets under management. In recent years, the quality and availability of these plans has been the subject of active policy attention and of several major lawsuits. This paper studies how employers and plan providers design these plans. We argue that low plan quality and limited provision can come from two sources. First, employer willingness to pay may be misaligned with that of workers or of regulators. Second, the market for plan provision may be imperfectly competitive. We propose a model of plan design and estimate that while both frictions are at play, significant changes to plan quality require modifying employer preferences. Accordingly, we evaluate proposed policies and conclude that only direct quality regulation can lead to significant quality improvements, although such regulation reduces plan provision.
29981.zh_abstract: 固定缴款计划是美国退休储蓄的主要工具，管理着近10万亿美元的资产。近年来，这些计划的质量和可用性一直是政策关注和几起重大诉讼的主题。本文研究了雇主和计划提供者如何设计这些计划。我们认为，低计划质量和有限的提供可能来自两个来源。首先，雇主的支付意愿可能与工人或监管机构的支付意愿不一致。其次，计划提供市场可能是不完全竞争的。我们提出了一个计划设计模型，并估计虽然两种摩擦都在起作用，但计划质量的显著改变需要修改雇主的偏好。因此，我们评估了拟议的政策，并得出结论，只有直接的质量监管才能带来显著的质量改进，尽管这种监管会减少计划的提供。

29980.title: AI, Trade and Creative Destruction: A First Look
29980.zh_title: 人工智能、贸易与创造性破坏：初步审视
29980.abstract: Artificial Intelligence is a powerful new technology that will likely have large impacts on the size, direction and composition of international trade flows. Yet almost nothing is known empirically about this. One AI-enabled set of services that can be tracked resides in the palm of our hands: the Mobile Apps used by half the world's population. To analyze the impact of AI on international trade in mobile App services we merge 2014-2020 data on international downloads of mobile Apps with data on the AI patents held by each App's parent company. From this we build a measure of AI deployment. We instrument AI deployment using cost-shifters from the theory of comparative advantage: Countries with a large stock of AI expertise will have a comparative advantage producing AI-intensive Apps. We show the following IV results. (1) Bilateral Trade: AI deployment increases App downloads by a factor of six. (2) Variety Effects: AI deployment doubles the number of exported App varieties. (3) Creative Destruction: AI deployment increases creative destruction (entry and exit of Apps) and in 2020 the net effect was an increase in welfare of between 2.5% and 10.6%.
29980.zh_abstract: 人工智能是一项强大的新技术，可能对国际贸易流动的规模、方向和构成产生巨大影响。然而，关于这一点，几乎没有任何实证研究。一类可追踪的、由人工智能驱动的服务就在我们掌心：全球一半人口使用的移动应用程序。为了分析人工智能对移动应用服务国际贸易的影响，我们将2014-2020年移动应用的国际下载数据与每个应用母公司持有的人工智能专利数据合并。由此我们构建了一个人工智能部署的衡量指标。我们使用来自比较优势理论的成本变动因素作为人工智能部署的工具变量：拥有大量人工智能专业知识储备的国家在生产人工智能密集型应用方面具有比较优势。我们展示了以下工具变量结果。（1）双边贸易：人工智能部署使应用下载量增加了六倍。（2）品种效应：人工智能部署使出口的应用品种数量翻了一番。（3）创造性破坏：人工智能部署增加了创造性破坏（应用的进入和退出），并且在2020年，净效应是福利增加了2.5%至10.6%。

29979.title: Educational Inequality*
29979.authors: Jo Blanden, Matthias Doepke, Jan Stuhler
29979.abstract: This chapter provides new evidence on educational inequality and reviews the literature on the causes and consequences of unequal education. We document large achievement gaps between children from different socio-economic backgrounds, show how patterns of educational inequality vary across countries, time, and generations, and establish a link between educational inequality and social mobility. We interpret this evidence from the perspective of economic models of skill acquisition and investment in human capital. The models account for different channels underlying unequal education and highlight how endogenous responses in parents' and children's educational investments generate a close link between economic inequality and educational inequality. Given concerns over the extended school closures during the Covid-19 pandemic, we also summarize early evidence on the impact of the pandemic on children's education and on possible long-run repercussions for educational inequality.
29979.zh_abstract: 本章提供了关于教育不平等的新证据，并回顾了关于不平等教育的原因和后果的文献。我们记录了来自不同社会经济背景的儿童之间巨大的成就差距，展示了教育不平等模式如何因国家、时间和代际而异，并建立了教育不平等与社会流动性之间的联系。我们从技能习得和人力资本投资的经济模型角度解释这一证据。这些模型解释了不平等教育背后的不同渠道，并强调了父母和子女教育投资的内生反应如何在经济不平等和教育不平等之间建立紧密联系。鉴于对新冠疫情期间学校长期关闭的担忧，我们还总结了关于疫情对儿童教育影响的早期证据，以及可能对教育不平等产生的长期影响。

29978.title: Should Copula Endogeneity Correction Include Generated Regressors for Higher-order Terms? No, It Hurts
29978.zh_title: Copula内生性修正是否应包括高阶项的产生回归量？不，这有害
29978.authors: Yi Qian, Hui Xie, Anthony Koschmann
29978.abstract: Causal inference in empirical studies is often challenging because of the presence of endogenous regressors. The classical approach to the problem requires using instrumental variables that must satisfy the stringent condition of exclusion restriction. A forefront of recent research is a new paradigm of handling endogenous regressors without using instrumental variables. Park and Gupta (Marketing Science, 2012) proposed instrument-free estimation using copulas that has been increasingly used in practical applications to address endogeneity bias. A relevant issue not studied is how to handle the higher-order terms (e.g., interaction and quadratic terms) of endogenous regressors using the copula approach. Recent applications of the approach have used disparate ways of handling these higher-order endogenous terms with unclear consequences. We show that once copula correction terms for the main effects of endogenous regressors are included as generated regressors, there is no need to include additional correction terms for the higher-order terms. This simplicity in handling higher-order endogenous regression terms is a merit of the instrument-free copula bias correction approach. More importantly, adding these unnecessary correction terms has harmful effects and leads to sub-optimal solutions of endogeneity bias, including finite-sample estimation bias and substantially inflated variability in estimates.
29978.zh_abstract: 实证研究中的因果推断常常因内生回归变量的存在而具有挑战性。解决该问题的经典方法需要使用工具变量，而工具变量必须满足严格的排除限制条件。近期研究的前沿是一种不使用工具变量处理内生回归变量的新范式。Park和Gupta（《营销科学》，2012）提出了使用Copula的无工具变量估计方法，该方法在实际应用中越来越多地被用于解决内生性偏差。一个尚未研究的相关问题是，如何使用Copula方法处理内生回归变量的高阶项（例如交互项和二次项）。该方法的最新应用在处理这些高阶内生项时采用了不同的方式，其后果尚不明确。我们表明，一旦将内生回归变量主效应的Copula修正项作为产生回归量包含在内，就无需为高阶项包含额外的修正项。这种处理高阶内生回归项的简洁性是无工具变量Copula偏差修正方法的一个优点。更重要的是，添加这些不必要的修正项会产生有害影响，并导致内生性偏差的次优解决方案，包括有限样本估计偏差和估计值变异性的显著膨胀。

29977.title: Expectations Data in Asset Pricing
29977.zh_title: 资产定价中的预期数据
29977.abstract: Asset prices reflect investors' subjective beliefs about future cash flows and prices. In this chapter, we review recent research on the formation of these beliefs and their role in asset pricing. Return expectations of individual and professional investors in surveys differ markedly from those implied by rational expectations models. Variation in subjective expectations of future cash flows and price levels appear to account for much of aggregate stock market volatility. Mapping the survey evidence into agent expectations in asset pricing models is complicated by measurement errors and belief heterogeneity. Recent efforts to build asset pricing models that match the survey evidence on subjective belief dynamics include various forms of learning about payout or price dynamics, extrapolative expectations, and diagnostic expectations. Challenges for future research include the exploration of subjective risk perceptions, aggregation of measured beliefs, and links between asset market expectations and the macroeconomy.
29977.zh_abstract: 资产价格反映了投资者对未来现金流和价格的主观信念。在本章中，我们回顾了关于这些信念形成及其在资产定价中作用的最新研究。调查中个人和专业投资者的回报预期与理性预期模型所隐含的预期存在显著差异。对未来现金流和价格水平的主观预期变化似乎解释了大部分股票市场总体波动。将调查证据映射到资产定价模型中的代理人预期中，因测量误差和信念异质性而变得复杂。近期构建与主观信念动态调查证据相匹配的资产定价模型的努力，包括关于支付或价格动态的各种学习形式、外推预期和诊断预期。未来研究的挑战包括探索主观风险感知、测量信念的聚合，以及资产市场预期与宏观经济之间的联系。
